title: Closures, Lexical State, Currying, and Factories · Side-Effect Repair Bay
summary: Create configurable validators without mutable module globals or late-binding bugs. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a closure-based validator factory with capture tests and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace lexical name capture and cell lookup after the enclosing call returns.
Detect and repair late-bound loop variables in generated callables.
Distinguish deliberate nonlocal state from pure closure configuration and document the effect.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
